title.ja: Claude Code のインストール

description:
A beginner-friendly walkthrough for your very first Claude Code installation: install the CLI with one command, log in for the first time, and make Claude Code build your first tiny webpage. No prior Claude Code experience required.

### What you'll see
- Installing Claude Code with a single curl command
- Logging in on first launch
- Running a first end-to-end prompt (build + open a webpage)
